app.confirmClose: There are {count} active SSH connections. Close anyway?
app.errorBoundaryMessage: An unexpected error occurred. Try reloading the application.
app.hostKeyChanged: WARNING! The host key of {host} has changed ({fingerprint}). Possible MITM attack. Connection rejected.
session.title: Sessions
session.emptyHint: Click + New session to save a server
session.deleteFolder:
Delete "{name}"?
Sessions and subfolders will be unassigned.
session.save.name: Name
session.save.credentialHint: Create a credential with the Credentials button in the top bar.
session.save.agentHint: The system SSH Agent (OpenSSH) will be used. The agent must be running with keys loaded.
terminal.emptyHint: Connect a server from the side panel.
credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.form.name: Name
credentials.form.dpapi: Encrypted with DPAPI (only decryptable on this machine and Windows user).
ai.hintGemini: Configure your Gemini API key in Settings to use the AI panel.
ai.hintAnthropic: Configure your Anthropic API key in Settings to use the AI panel.
ai.hintReady: Ask a question about terminal content. The last {lines} lines will be sent as context to {provider}.
ai.placeholderReady: Ask about the terminal... (Enter to send)
sftp.label: SFTP
sftp.table.name: Name
sftp.chmod.title: Permissions
sftp.transfers.title: Transfers
fileExplorer.title: Explorer
fileExplorer.hint: Connect an SSH session to explore its files.
settings.title: Settings
settings.general.title: General
settings.terminal.title: Terminal
settings.ai.title: Artificial Intelligence
settings.ai.contextNote: Fewer lines = lower token cost; more lines = more context.
settings.ai.historyNote: How many previous messages are sent so the AI remembers the conversation. 0 = no memory. More messages = more tokens.
settings.ai.anthropicKeySet: You already have a saved key. Enter a new one to replace it.
settings.ai.anthropicKeyUnset: Required to use Claude. Encrypted with DPAPI.
settings.ai.geminiKeySet: You already have a saved key. Enter a new one to replace it.
settings.ai.geminiKeyUnset: Get it at aistudio.google.com. Encrypted with DPAPI.
settings.ai.geminiPrivacyFree: Without active billing, usage is free and cannot generate charges.
settings.ai.geminiPrivacyData: On the free tier, Google may use data to improve its models. Do not send sensitive information.
settings.connections.title: Connections
settings.connections.sessionsNote: Sessions are saved in this JSON file (no passwords). You can copy or share it.
settings.connections.knownHostsEmpty: No saved hosts. On first connection you will be asked to accept the fingerprint.
settings.about.title: About
settings.about.licenseNote: This software is free and open source under the MIT license. You can use, modify, and distribute it freely.
settings.about.logNote: The application logs events to this file. Open it to diagnose issues.
settings.general.restartNotice: Restart the application to apply the language change.
splash.title: jcoTerm
lock.title: Unlock jcoTerm
lock.createHint: This password protects access to the application. It will be required every time you open jcoTerm.
settings.connections.exportNote: Export all sessions and folders to a JSON file. Credentials are not included.
errors.ssh.authFailed: Authentication error. Verify user and credentials.
errors.ssh.timeout: Connection timed out. Verify host and port.
errors.ssh.refused: Connection refused. Verify that the SSH server is running.
errors.ssh.hostNotFound: Host not found. Verify the name or IP address.
errors.ssh.networkUnreachable: Network unreachable. Check your network connection.
errors.ssh.agentError: SSH Agent error. Verify the OpenSSH Agent service is active with keys loaded.
errors.ssh.genericError: Error: {detail}. Check the log for more details.
errors.ssh.tooManyAttempts: Too many connection attempts. Wait a moment.
errors.ssh.hostKeyUnknown: Unknown host key. Verify the fingerprint before accepting.
errors.ssh.hostKeyMismatch: WARNING! The host key has changed. This could indicate a MITM attack.
errors.ai.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Wait a moment.
errors.ai.messageTooLong: Message exceeds the limit of {limit} characters
errors.ai.keyNotConfigured: {provider} API key not configured. Go to Settings to add it.
errors.ai.anthropicAuthFailed: Anthropic API key invalid or expired. Check it in Settings.
errors.ai.anthropicRateLimit: Anthropic request limit reached. Wait a few seconds.
errors.ai.anthropicOverloaded: Anthropic is temporarily overloaded. Try again in a few seconds.
errors.ai.anthropicApiError: Anthropic API error ({status}). Check the log for details.
errors.ai.anthropicNetworkError: Network error contacting Anthropic. Check your connection.
errors.ai.geminiQuotaDaily: You have reached the free daily query limit for Gemini.{resetHint}
errors.ai.geminiQuotaRpm: Gemini per-minute query limit reached. Wait ~60 seconds.{resetHint}
errors.ai.geminiQuotaTpm: Gemini per-minute token limit reached. Wait ~60 seconds.{resetHint}
errors.ai.geminiStreamLimit: Gemini limit reached ({limitType}). Wait and try again.
errors.settings.pathNotAllowed: Path not allowed. Must be within the user directory.
